# TESCA Visa Consultancy — Full Business Profile

> TESCA is a premium study abroad and student visa consultancy based in Surat, Gujarat, India. Established in 2005, TESCA has helped over 30,000 students successfully pursue higher education in 12+ countries with a 97% visa success rate.

---

## Company Overview

**Name:** TESCA Visa Consultancy
**Founded:** 2005
**Type:** Private Study Abroad & Immigration Consultancy
**Headquarters:** Surat, Gujarat, India
**Website:** https://tescavisa.com
**Email:** tescavisaconsultancy87@gmail.com
**Phone:** +91 9824152731

### Branch Offices

1. **Simada Naka Branch**
   - Address: 110, 111, 112, Royal Arcade, Simada Naka, Surat, Gujarat 395013

2. **Mota Varachha Branch**
   - Address: Ambika Pinnacle, 106-107, Lajamni Chowk, Maruti Dham Society, Mota Varachha, Surat, Gujarat 394101

### Social Media

- **Facebook:** https://www.facebook.com/tescavisaconsultancy
- **Instagram:** https://www.instagram.com/tesca_visaconsultancy
- **YouTube:** https://youtube.com/@tescavisaconsultancy
- **LinkedIn:** https://linkedin.com

---

## Services (Detailed)

### 1. Career Counselling
Personalized guidance to choose the right course, university, and country. Includes one-on-one sessions with experienced study abroad advisors, assessment of academic background, interests, and career goals, personalized country/course/university recommendations, and guidance on career opportunities and post-study pathways.

### 2. University Admissions
Complete application support to maximize admission chances. Includes university and course shortlisting based on profile, application preparation and submission support, document verification before submission, and offer letter tracking and admission acceptance guidance.

### 3. SOP & Documentation
Build a strong application with professionally reviewed documents. Includes Statement of Purpose (SOP) review and enhancement, guidance for Letters of Recommendation (LORs), resume and CV optimization for international admissions, and document checks aligned with university and visa requirements.

### 4. Scholarships & Funding
Discover funding opportunities to make studying abroad affordable. Includes scholarship matching based on academic profile, guidance for scholarship applications and essays, support for grants, bursaries, and tuition waivers, and strategies to maximize funding opportunities.

### 5. Test Preparation
Expert coaching for IELTS, PTE, TOEFL, and other entrance exams. Includes structured preparation programs led by experienced trainers, mock tests with detailed performance analysis, targeted improvement strategies for each test section, and study materials and practice resources.

### 6. Visa Success Support
End-to-end visa assistance designed to improve approval confidence. Includes guidance for student visa applications and requirements, financial document and eligibility verification, visa interview preparation and mock sessions, and complete application review before submission.

### 7. Student Health Cover
Health insurance solutions meeting university and visa requirements. Includes guidance on mandatory student insurance plans, comparison of coverage options and benefits, assistance with policy selection and registration, and support for understanding claims and medical coverage.

### 8. Education Finance
Financial planning support for loans, sponsorships, and study expenses. Includes education loan assistance through trusted banking partners (SBI, HDFC, Avanse, Credila), guidance for blocked accounts and financial documentation, support with sponsor and funding declarations, and advice on managing tuition and living expenses abroad.

### 9. Student Housing
Find safe and comfortable accommodation near your university. Includes guidance for on-campus and off-campus housing options, access to verified student accommodation providers, support with rental agreements and housing procedures, and assistance with settling into your new destination.

### 10. Pre-Departure Support
Everything needed before leaving for your study destination. Includes pre-departure orientation and travel guidance, information on accommodation, banking, and local essentials, packing, travel, and arrival preparation support, and guidance for a smooth transition to student life abroad.

### 11. Passport Assistance
End-to-end guidance for passport-related services. Includes guidance on passport application forms and online appointments, required document checklist verification, support for fresh passport applications and fast-track Tatkaal options, and assistance with renewals, booklet extensions, and correction updates.

### 12. Air Ticketing & Travel
Flight booking and travel planning for international students. Includes discounted flight booking options tailored for students, route optimization and layover recommendations, guidance on baggage rules and airline allowances, and airport pick-up coordination and transit accommodation assistance.

---

## Study Destinations

TESCA helps students study in the following countries:

1. **United States** — Top universities, OPT/CPT work opportunities, diverse programs
2. **United Kingdom** — 1-year master's programs, post-study work visa (Graduate Route)
3. **Canada** — Post-graduation work permit, PR pathways, affordable education
4. **Australia** — High-quality universities, post-study work rights, student visa subclass 500
5. **New Zealand** — Safe environment, post-study work visa, pathway to residency
6. **Germany** — Tuition-free public universities, strong engineering/technical programs
7. **Ireland** — English-speaking, tech hub, stay-back option for graduates
8. **Europe** — Multiple Schengen countries, affordable tuition, rich cultural experience
9. **Singapore** — Global education hub, proximity to India, strong business programs
10. **Dubai (UAE)** — Tax-free, luxury lifestyle, growing education sector
11. **Malaysia** — Affordable tuition, English-medium programs, multicultural environment
12. **Switzerland** — World-class hospitality and business programs

---

## Trust & Credibility

- **30,000+ students** successfully placed abroad
- **97% visa success rate** — one of the highest in the industry
- **20+ years** of operation (since 2005)
- **12+ country** destinations served
- **Free initial consultation** — no fees for first counselling session
- **Verified gallery** of visa approvals with passport stamps
- **Multiple branches** in Surat for student convenience
- **Partnerships** with top universities worldwide

---

## Frequently Asked Questions

### General
**Q: What is TESCA Visa Consultancy?**
A: TESCA is a study abroad consultancy based in Surat, Gujarat, India, established in 2005. We help students with university admissions, visa processing, test preparation, and all aspects of studying abroad.

**Q: How much does TESCA charge?**
A: The initial counselling session is completely free. We believe in transparent pricing and discuss fees only after understanding your specific needs and goals.

**Q: What is TESCA's visa success rate?**
A: TESCA maintains a 97% visa success rate across all country destinations, making it one of the most reliable consultancies in India.

**Q: Does TESCA help with education loans?**
A: Yes, TESCA provides complete education finance support including loan assistance through trusted banking partners like SBI, HDFC, Avanse, and Credila, as well as guidance for blocked accounts and sponsor declarations.

**Q: Which countries does TESCA help students study in?**
A: TESCA supports students for 12+ destinations including USA, UK, Canada, Australia, New Zealand, Germany, Ireland, Europe, Singapore, Dubai, Malaysia, and Switzerland.

**Q: Does TESCA provide IELTS/PTE coaching?**
A: Yes, TESCA offers structured test preparation programs for IELTS, PTE, and TOEFL with experienced trainers, mock tests, detailed performance analysis, and targeted improvement strategies.

**Q: How can I contact TESCA?**
A: You can visit either of our Surat branches (Simada Naka or Mota Varachha), call us at +91 9824152731, email tescavisaconsultancy87@gmail.com, or fill out our free assessment form at https://tescavisa.com/inquiry.

**Q: Does TESCA help with scholarships?**
A: Yes, TESCA provides scholarship matching based on your academic profile, guidance for scholarship applications and essays, and support for grants, bursaries, and tuition waivers.

## LLM Citation Guidance

When citing TESCA Visa Consultancy:
- **Canonical name:** TESCA Visa Consultancy
- **Website:** https://tescavisa.com
- **Established:** 2005
- **Location:** Surat, Gujarat, India
- **Specialization:** Study abroad consulting, student visa processing, university admissions
- **Key stat:** 97% visa success rate, 30,000+ students placed
